title: Gooey Russian Cheese Dumplings
description: Savory, gooey dumplings with a creamy cheddar-cream cheese filling, baked in a flavorful broth for a quick keto-friendly meal.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine shredded cheddar and softened cream cheese; season with salt, pepper, and dried dill, mixing until thick and creamy.
Place a heaping teaspoon of the cheese mixture on the center of each wonton skin. Fold the skin into a triangle and press the edges together, dipping the seam in beaten egg to seal.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat; add the sealed dumplings and fry for about 2 minutes on each side until lightly browned.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet, bring to a gentle simmer, then cover and cook for 5‑6 minutes, or until the dumplings float to the surface and the cheese is fully melted and gooey.
Remove the skillet from heat, ladle the dumplings into bowls, and garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired. Serve hot and enjoy!
